services.title: Outlet & Switch Replacement
services.description: New outlets, switches, and GFCI upgrades. Safe, code-compliant installations.

services.title: Ceiling Fan Installation
services.description: Mount, wire, and balance ceiling fans. Existing or new electrical boxes.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Electrical panel replacement and circuit additions for modern power needs.

services.title: Light Fixture Installation
services.description: Recessed lights, chandeliers, and outdoor lighting. Professional mounting and wiring.

services.title: Home Rewiring
services.description: Full electrical system updates for older homes. Safe, reliable power throughout.

about.heading: Columbus Electrician You Can Count On
about.body: We're a Columbus electrical team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one electrician, one bill.

reviews.name: Addie V.
reviews.text: Can't recommend Samantha enough. She's reliable, patient, answers questions, and really knowledgeable. Made our home project checklist much smaller.

reviews.name: Amber L.
reviews.text: Sam is awesome! Very professional and listened to what we wanted. Made great suggestions for our 1950s house. Fair pricing and explained everything clearly.

reviews.name: Erin K.
reviews.text: Responsive, showed up on time, super nice and installed my ceiling fan. Also switched out a light switch while here. Happy with the outcome!

service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Local electrical service you can trust

cta.heading: Ready to Get Your Electrical Work Done Right?
cta.body: Free estimates, upfront pricing, and work that passes inspection the first time.
